note: Closed vocabulary — agents MUST assign topics only from this list. No free-text tags. v2: topics are per-file weighted major/minor (see knowledge/topic_facet_schema.md); type_registry is the orthogonal file-kind facet.

descriptions.boot_sequence: B1/B2/B3 boot process, compact_state.md detection, active_thread phase check, hash comparison for skip-load
descriptions.per_turn_routing: C0/C1/C2/C3 routing gates, topic-switch detection, complaint handling (R16), c0_resolved flag
descriptions.mece_planning: Phase 2 plan construction, Verify-N criteria, section dependencies, user confirmation gate
descriptions.phase_gates: gather_complete.md + mece_plan.md PreToolUse enforcement, phase transition rules, hook blocking
descriptions.react_loop: Phase 3 L1-L5 execution, [✓ written] verification, BLOCKED handling, section_complete logic
descriptions.session_management: Session open/close/handoff, active_thread.md, session_tokens.md, session_indexer, compact_state
descriptions.behavioral_contract: Trigger/Refusal Contract/Workflow/Output Contract/Routing — 5 elements required in every SKILL.md
descriptions.cfp_logging: CODING_FAILURE_PATTERNS.md entries, Symptom/Root cause/Prevention/Detection Signal structure, CFP-NNN IDs
descriptions.token_tracking: SESSION_TOTAL/CHAT_TOTAL counters, R3 thresholds, TOKEN PAUSE logic, reset rules per event
descriptions.skill_routing: skill-manifest.json keyword matching, registry.md fast-match table, skill_name resolution at boot B2
descriptions.index_sync: index_files.json/index_variables.json maintenance, R8 rule, backlink update on file create/move/delete
descriptions.harness_editing: Editing CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/SKILL.md files, harness_editor skill, file size contract (≤200L)
descriptions.error_protocol: error_index.md, ERR-XXX pattern IDs, R9 step-0 recurring check, AttemptID, Failed Approaches log
descriptions.sub_agent_rules: R4 spawn patterns, OmO roles (Architect/Executor/Reviewer), max depth=1, Explore/Parallel fan-out
descriptions.compact_handling: /compact trigger, compact_state.md schema (dt/sk/sk_h/mece_h/section/step), CHAT_TOTAL reset, pre-compact emit
descriptions.cfp_immunity: harness_doctor diagnosis/audit/proposal/execute loop, self_improve escalation (deferred≥3), index_cfp_fix.json
descriptions.token_estimation: token_estimator.py formula (thai×1.7 + en×0.3), calibration against actual usage, accuracy tracking
descriptions.platform_detection: detected.md platform field, B4 probe, spawn_tool selection (claude-code vs other), tool availability check
descriptions.knowledge_base: knowledge/ directory files, harness_flow_20260526.md, Implement/ procedure docs, Y-row patch tables
descriptions.topic_graph: topic_registry.json taxonomy, backlink_analyzer.py overlap computation, 3-tier linking (references/backlinks/related)
descriptions.token_counting: API-level token counting methods across providers
descriptions.token_efficiency: Strategies and patterns for reducing token usage in agent workflows
descriptions.telemetry: Observability, metrics collection, and dashboard specs for agent systems
descriptions.prompt_caching: Prompt cache usage, hit rates, and cost optimization via caching
descriptions.cost_optimization: Techniques to reduce API costs including batching, caching, and compression
descriptions.compaction: Context window compaction and conversation state management

type_registry.note: FACET 1 — file kind (orthogonal to topic). Closed set. Used for navigation/filter only, NOT in link-strength formula (v2). Extend only via propose+confirm.

descriptions.harness: Core agent-behavior rule files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, INVARIANTS.md, Implement/*)
descriptions.tool: Executable scripts under scripts/ that automate harness tasks
